gold.rationale: 文本把社交平台上的推测性讨论包装成已核实案情（含地点、伤情与“立案并刑拘”等结论），但给不出可核验证据；同时两张关键“现场/监控”配图为生成或经明显编辑的画面，且在车辆颜色、主体与事故机制上与正文叙述不一致，导致整体主要印象具有误导性。

sentence_level.sentence_text: “开门杀”指车辆开门时未观察后方来车或行人引发的碰撞事故，开门一方未尽到安全注意义务，往往需要承担相应责任。

paragraph_level: 多段据称发生在江西上饶某小学门口早高峰的现场画面因涉及违停、开门杀及疑似逃逸情节引发关注。
视频显示家长违停占道，孩子开门导致电动车人员倒地并疑似颅脑损伤，家长随后驾车逃离。
现场画面在传播过程中被二次编辑，添加红圈、箭头、字幕及透视拉伸处理，且未提供原视频链接。
网友转述称警方已对涉事家长以肇事逃逸立案刑拘，后续可能面临吊销驾驶证、拘留及罚款。
交警部门提示违停是常见交通安全隐患，并建议采用荷式开门或两段式开门以保障安全。
律师提醒发生事故后应立即停车、报警并救助伤者，擅自离开现场可能带来更严重的法律后果。

quoted_text_and_attributions.quoted_text: #家长违停孩子开门杀撞人后逃逸#
附近商铺监控截图流出

atoms: A silver sedan is parked on the side of a road with its right rear door open.
A person wearing a bicycle helmet is lying on the asphalt next to an overturned bicycle.
A woman is kneeling on the ground next to the person on the floor.
A red circle overlay highlights the open car door.
A large red arrow points from the open door towards the person on the ground.
White text at the bottom reads '违停开门撞倒骑行者' (Illegal parking door opening knocks down cyclist).
Red text at the bottom right reads '家长疑似逃逸' (Parent suspected of fleeing).
The license plate of the silver car is blurred out.
A white sedan is parked on the right side of a city street with its rear passenger door open.
A person is lying on the ground near the open car door.
A delivery rider on a scooter is driving past the scene.
The timestamp '2026-03-26 07:48:12' is visible in the top left corner.
The camera identifier 'CAM-03' is visible in the top right corner.
Red and white traffic barriers are placed along the sidewalk on the left.
A composite image containing four separate photos of traffic police officers.
The top photo shows a police officer standing next to a white SUV in a parking lot with the text '正确的停车“姿势”' (Correct parking 'posture').
The second photo shows a police officer next to a white Volkswagen with the text '错误的停车“姿势”' (Incorrect parking 'posture').
The third photo shows a police officer next to a white car near a blue 'P' parking sign.
The bottom photo shows a police officer next to a black sedan.
Watermarks for '法治四川' (Rule of Law Sichuan) are visible in the bottom right corner.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A photo of a traffic accident scene on a city street. A silver car is parked with its door open, and a cyclist is lying on the ground next to their bike. A woman is attending to the cyclist. Red graphical overlays (circle and arrow) and text captions are added to the image.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 违停开门撞倒骑行者 | 家长疑似逃逸
visible_overlays_annotations: red circle around open car door
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The text overlays describe the scene as an accident caused by illegal parking and door opening, and suggest the driver fled.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A screenshot from a security camera showing a street scene. A white car is parked with its door open, a person is on the ground, and a scooter is passing by. The image has a timestamp and camera ID.
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image provides raw footage of the incident described in the first image, showing the car door open and a person on the ground.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An infographic composed of four photos showing traffic police officers interacting with parked cars. The top section contrasts correct and incorrect parking postures with text labels.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 正确的停车“姿势” | 错误的停车“姿势” | P | 法治四川
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image serves as a public service announcement about proper parking, unrelated to the specific accident narrative in the other images.

cross_modal: image_1 is presented as the primary visual evidence of the 'door opening' incident described in the text, showing a silver car with its door open and a cyclist on the ground.
image_2 is presented as the 'monitoring camera' footage mentioned in the text, showing a white car with a door ajar and a person on the ground.
image_3 is presented as 'educational material' regarding correct and incorrect parking, used to support the text's discussion on traffic safety and parking regulations.
the post uses image_1 to visually support the claim that the car was illegally parked ('违停') and the door opened ('开门杀') causing the accident.
the post uses image_2 to visually support the claim of 'suspected escape' ('疑似逃逸') by showing a driver leaving the scene while a person is on the ground.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post presents this image as the key scene of the accident where a car door opened, hitting a cyclist, and the driver allegedly fled.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A silver sedan parked on the street with its rear passenger door wide open. A cyclist is lying on the ground next to the car, and a woman is kneeling nearby. A red circle highlights the open door and a red arrow points to the cyclist.
cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: 违停开门撞倒骑行者 (Illegal parking door opening knocks down cyclist), 家长疑似逃逸 (Parent suspected of fleeing)

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post identifies this image as a 'monitoring camera' screenshot showing the moment the car door opened and the person on the ground.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A wide-angle street view with a timestamp '2026-03-26 07:48:12'. A white car is parked on the right with its rear door open. A person is lying on the ground near the car, and a delivery scooter is passing by.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image to illustrate the concept of 'correct' versus 'incorrect' parking mentioned in the text as a safety reminder.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A collage of four photos showing traffic police interacting with drivers. The top photo shows a police officer pointing at a car in a parking spot labeled 'Correct parking posture'. The bottom three photos show police officers inspecting cars parked on the road or in improper spots, labeled 'Incorrect parking posture'.

retrieved_evidence.text: 据社交平台近日出现的话题内容显示，“家长违停孩子开门杀撞人后逃逸”相关表述引发了不少网民关注和讨论。有网民称，该话题涉及未成年人在车内开门与路人发生碰撞、当事车辆随后离开现场等情节，一度登上平台热门讨论榜。据了解，部分法律和交通领域人士在评论区提醒称，机动车停放、上下车行为一旦涉及人身伤害，责任划分较为复杂，呼吁家长在日常出行中更加重视对未成年人的安全教育与规范引导。

—您好警察叔叔，找我有什么事嘛？

—肇事逃逸，吊销驾驶证，行政拘留，罚款，懂？
#家长违停孩子开门杀撞人后逃逸# ​​​
近日，有关某地发生“家长违停后孩子开门杀致人重伤，家长当场驾车逃逸”交通肇事事件的描述在社交平台流传，多数转发内容以路边违停的小型轿车、电动车以及疑似倒地行人的场合细节为例，强调右侧车门突然开启对非机动车道和人行空间造成的严重安全威胁。据相关人员介绍，网传内容将车辆停靠位置、倒地者附近散落物等细节标注出来，突出违停、开门不观察与后续驾车离开等情节的危害性。

好好好，现场直播了是吧～

他这一脚油门，起码驾驶证是扣光分了，还有可能面临行政拘留和罚款，你说这图啥呢？

不过有一说一啊，有其父必有其子，家长逃逸了，孩子也装没看见是吧？#家长违停孩子开门杀撞人后逃逸# ​​​
据相关渠道转述，当地一处道路沿线监控记录到事发时段路边一辆轿车右侧车门处于半开状态，一辆从后方驶来的电动车在接近时发生擦碰后失控，驾驶人随即倒地，现场一度混乱。相关记录中的时间、摄像头编号等信息被用来还原当时的行车环境和车流状况。警方随后通报称，该起涉嫌“开门杀”的交通肇事行为中，涉事家长存在违法停车、未尽安全注意义务以及疑似驾车离开现场等问题，目前已被依法采取刑事拘留措施。
在此次“家长违停后孩子开门杀致人重伤，家长当场驾车逃逸”事件引发关注后，多地交警部门通过官方账号再次发布交通安全科普内容，提醒驾驶人规范停车，避免占用非机动车道及人行道，重点提示不得在临近车流一侧随意开启车门，乘车人下车前应遵守“左手开门”或回头观察等安全习惯。相关提示材料还结合典型事故案例，说明违停不仅影响视线、遮挡其他交通参与者，对骑行人员和行人更可能造成类似重伤后果。
交通事故处理部门近日在解读典型案例时指出，俗称“开门杀”的情况，通常指机动车或非机动车在靠边停驻后，驾乘人员在开门下车时未充分观察后方来车和行人，导致与正常行驶的车辆或路过行人发生突然碰撞的一类事故。据介绍，此类事故多发生在路边车位、学校周边道路或居民小区门口等区域，往往具有突发性强、受伤人员多为非机动车骑行者或行人的特点，相关部门提醒车内人员在开门前应先确认后方路况。

多地公安交管和教育部门近日在开展交通安全宣传活动时，再次强调规范停车和文明开门的重要性。宣讲资料中提示，驾驶人和乘车人应在合规地点停车，开门前通过后视镜、转头观察等方式确认后方情况，一些宣传材料还介绍了被称为“荷式开门”的动作，即用远离车门一侧的手拉开车门，从而自然带动身体转向后方，以便更充分观察来车和行人。据相关人员介绍，类似科普内容旨在提高公众日常出行的细节安全意识，减少因疏忽导致的碰撞伤害风险。

违停=危停！车辆违停隐患重重，不仅影响道路通行秩序，还容易引发交通事故。戳图了解如何规范停车！via～四川观察  泗洪警方
网友讨论#网红违停被罚跳上警车吼叫#，交通安全无小事[友幸][友幸] #家长违停孩子开门杀撞人后逃逸# ​​​
据交通管理部门近日介绍，城市道路两侧的机动车违法停放行为，易占用通行空间、遮挡视线，干扰正常车流和行人通行秩序，被视为当前较为常见的交通安全隐患之一。多位一线交警表示，部分驾驶人图一时方便，将车辆停放在路口、斑马线附近或非机动车道内，遇到高峰期或紧急情况下，可能增加追尾、刮擦以及行人横穿时的风险。相关部门呼吁市民提高安全意识，按规定选择停车地点，减少不必要的道路安全风险。

the post uses image_1 to visually support the claim that the car was illegally parked ('违停') and the door opened ('开门杀') causing the accident.
the post uses image_2 to visually support the claim of 'suspected escape' ('疑似逃逸') by showing a driver leaving the scene while a person is on the ground.

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the general event and visual details but overstates the police action from 'suspected escape' to confirmed criminal detention, and frames unverified netizen claims as established facts.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: Post claims '警方已以肇事逃逸对涉事家长立案并刑拘' (police filed a case and criminally detained the parent), whereas evidence [1] and [4] only confirm the topic involves 'suspected escape' and general legal warnings without stating the parent has been criminally detained or that a case has been filed.
t2_problematic_subclaims: 警方已以肇事逃逸对涉事家长立案并刑拘
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate regarding the event description and visual evidence but distorts the severity of the legal outcome by presenting unverified speculation as confirmed police action.

images.scene_description: A composite image showing a silver sedan with its rear passenger door open, a bicycle lying on the ground, and a person on the ground being attended to by a woman. Red graphical overlays highlight the open door and point to the person on the ground.
images.ocr_text: 违停开门撞倒骑行者 | 家长疑似逃逸
images.v2_evidence: Red circles and arrows are digitally overlaid on the image to highlight the open car door and the person on the ground, which are not present in the original scene.
images.explanation: The image is a real photo of an accident scene but has been edited with red graphical overlays (circles and arrows) to emphasize specific elements, constituting V2 visual editing.

images.scene_description: A CCTV surveillance screenshot showing a white sedan parked on the side of a road with its rear door open. A person is lying on the ground near the car, and a scooter is passing by. The timestamp reads 2026-03-26 07:48:12.
images.explanation: The image is a clean surveillance feed showing the incident described in the text and evidence, with no visual editing or synthetic elements.

images.scene_description: A collage of four images showing traffic police officers interacting with parked cars. The top image shows a correct parking posture, while the bottom three show incorrect parking postures with officers gesturing.
images.ocr_text: 正确的停车“姿势” | 错误的停车“姿势” | P | 法治四川
images.v2_evidence: The image is a composite collage with large text banners ('正确的停车“姿势”', '错误的停车“姿势”') and graphical dividers added to create an infographic style.
images.explanation: The image is an official traffic safety poster created as a composite collage with added text banners and graphical elements to illustrate parking rules, fitting the V2 definition of visual editing/infographic styling.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post uses a mix of edited news photos (V2) and official safety posters (V2) to support the narrative of a traffic accident and subsequent safety warnings.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖子将‘疑似’逃逸定性为已立案刑拘，存在事实夸大与误导；同时配图均包含数字叠加、合成等编辑痕迹，且第三张图为通用科普图而非事故现场，图文语境错位，导致整体信息可信度受损。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post distorts the 'suspected' nature of the police action into a confirmed legal outcome, and all images contain digital overlays or composites. The third image is a general safety tip, not the specific incident, creating a contextual mismatch.
judge.core_claim: The post claims a viral social media topic involves a parent illegally parking, a child opening the car door to hit a cyclist, and the parent fleeing the scene, supported by edited images and police action.
key_subclaims: The post claims the police have filed a case and criminally detained the parent for suspected escape.
The post claims the images show a silver car with its door open and a cyclist on the ground.
The post claims the images show a white car with its door open and a person on the ground.
The post claims the third image is educational material about correct parking postures.
The post claims the images have been digitally edited with red circles, arrows, and text overlays.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the police have filed a case and criminally detained the parent for suspected escape.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [1] and [5] only confirm 'suspected escape' and that the parent was 'criminally detained' (刑拘) based on police reports, but the post presents this as a confirmed fact without citing the official police report, while the text itself says 'suspected' (疑似) in the title but asserts the detention as a fact in the body. The upstream text analyser flagged this as a distortion of the 'suspected' nature to a confirmed legal action.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the images show a silver car with its door open and a cyclist on the ground.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 clearly shows a silver sedan with an open door and a cyclist on the ground.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the images show a white car with its door open and a person on the ground.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 2 clearly shows a white sedan with an open door and a person on the ground.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the third image is educational material about correct parking postures.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 3 is a collage of police officers and text labels about parking postures.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post claims the images have been digitally edited with red circles, arrows, and text overlays.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 has red circles and arrows; Image 2 has a timestamp and camera ID overlay; Image 3 has text banners.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post contains a distortion (T2) by presenting 'suspected' police action as a confirmed fact, and includes visual editing (V2) in all three images (overlays, composites). The third image is contextually mismatched (C2) as it is a general safety tip rather than the specific incident, creating a pragmatic inconsistency (C3) in the narrative flow. The combination of T2 and V2 with C2/C3 pushes the verdict to Mostly False.

image_findings.explanation: The image contains digital overlays (red circle, arrow, text) that highlight the accident scene, constituting visual editing.
The image is a screenshot with a timestamp and camera ID overlay, which counts as visual editing.
The image is a composite infographic with text banners and watermarks, constituting visual editing.
